_notes.posture: Strictest Tier 0. Only api.anthropic.com is reachable — no GitHub, no npm, nothing. Every package Claude wants to install will fail, so this assumes the repo is already fully bootstrapped (dependencies installed, local tooling ready).
_notes.threat_model: You want to review code without any data exfiltration path. Pair with Tier 1 (Apple Container or Lima) for real filesystem isolation — Tier 0 alone leaves ~/.ssh and ~/.aws readable.
_notes.you_will_hit_walls: Expected. Every domain you need for the task must be explicitly added. This is the 'make it hurt so I notice the network reach' posture.
